businessSummary.oneLiner: Government and enterprise AI data analytics platform leader with Gotham (defense), Foundry (enterprise), and AIP (AI platform)
businessSummary.description: Palantir builds AI data analytics platforms for government and enterprise. FY2025 revenue reached $4.48B (+60%). US commercial revenue surpassed $650M (Q4 +137% YoY). The Pentagon designated Maven AI as an official program of record for military-wide deployment. FY2026 guidance of $7.19B-$7.41B (+60-65%) signals accelerating growth. However, Forward P/E of ~114x remains a significant overhang.
howTheyMakeMoney: Enterprise AI platform (Foundry) - Large enterprise data integration
AIP (AI Platform) - Generative AI integration platform
AIP bootcamps - Rapid customer conversion programs

keyMetrics.name: Forward P/E
keyMetrics.interpretation: Extreme premium even within software. Rule of 40 score of 127% partially justifies it, but growth deceleration risk is severe

keyMetrics.name: P/S (Price-to-Sales)
keyMetrics.interpretation: 3-4x the SaaS average (10-15x). Palantir's +60% growth rate is the only justification

keyMetrics.name: Revenue Growth (FY2025)
keyMetrics.interpretation: 60% growth at this scale is exceptionally rare. Q4 hit +70% YoY

keyMetrics.name: US Commercial Revenue (Q4)
keyMetrics.interpretation: Explosive enterprise customer acquisition. Key driver in reducing government dependency

keyMetrics.name: Rule of 40
keyMetrics.interpretation: Revenue growth + profit margin at 127%. Among the highest in SaaS industry

keyMetrics.name: Net Dollar Retention (NDR)
keyMetrics.interpretation: Existing customers spending 39% more YoY. Proves high product stickiness

growthDrivers.title: Maven AI Designated as Official Military Program of Record
growthDrivers.description: Pentagon designated Maven Smart System as official program of record (3/20). Long-term military-wide deployment confirmed, securing stable defense revenue. Combat-tested in Iran with thousands of strikes

growthDrivers.title: UK FCA 3-Month Trial Contract
growthDrivers.description: UK Financial Conduct Authority adopting Palantir Foundry on a 3-month trial, paying £30K+ per week. Signals expansion into regulatory sectors beyond defense

growthDrivers.title: Combat AI Deployment in Iran, Thousands of Strikes
growthDrivers.description: NYT/Reuters reports Pentagon operating Palantir + Anthropic AI system to identify Iran strike targets. Reduced target identification to execution timeline from hours to minutes

growthDrivers.title: FY2026 Revenue Guidance $7.19B-$7.41B (+60-65%)
growthDrivers.description: Management confident in accelerating growth. US commercial segment emerging as core growth engine, reducing government dependency

growthDrivers.title: US Commercial Revenue Q4 +137% Explosion
growthDrivers.description: Q4 US commercial revenue $650M (+137% YoY). 180 deals over $1M, 61 deals over $10M. AIP bootcamps driving rapid customer conversion

growthDrivers.title: Wedbush Dan Ives Maintains $230 Target
growthDrivers.description: Wedbush's Dan Ives maintained $230 target after Maven designation, calling Palantir 'the backbone of US military AI'

competitiveAdvantage.summary: 20+ years of government defense AI track record, highest security clearances, Maven military-wide adoption, combat-tested in Iran. Moats money cannot buy

moats.description: Ontology platform deeply integrated into government/military systems. Once deployed, replacement cost is extremely high
Highest-level security clearances and 20+ years of government trust. Virtually impossible for new entrants to achieve
Rapid customer acquisition through AIP bootcamps and expanding Ontology data model ecosystem
Real-time use in thousands of Iran strikes. Combat data is the ultimate competitive advantage

competitors.name: Anduril Industries
competitors.detail: Defense AI/drone startup. Pursuing $60B valuation funding round. Hardware-focused, complementary to Palantir

competitors.name: Snowflake / Databricks
competitors.detail: Enterprise data platform competition. Significantly behind in government/defense accessibility

competitors.name: Microsoft / AWS
competitors.detail: Cloud giants entering government AI. Scale advantage but cannot match Palantir's specialized Ontology integration

competitors.name: C3.ai
competitors.detail: Enterprise AI platform. Significantly behind in both revenue scale and growth rate

recentNews.headline: PLTR -3.77% on broad tech weakness
recentNews.significance: Despite Maven news, macro weakness and Forward P/E 114x valuation burden drove decline. Insider selling pressure noted

recentNews.headline: Maven designation drives +6.78% surge
recentNews.significance: Pentagon's official program of record designation triggered single-day 6.78% rally. Long-term defense revenue base secured

recentNews.headline: Pentagon designates Maven AI as core military system
recentNews.significance: Upgraded from pilot to official program. Stable long-term budget allocation and military-wide deployment confirmed

recentNews.headline: UK FCA begins Foundry platform 3-month trial
recentNews.significance: Expansion into financial regulatory sector. Signal of government client diversification beyond defense

recentNews.headline: Palantir + Anthropic AI used in Iran strike targeting
recentNews.significance: Maven system integrated with Anthropic Claude for thousands of Iran strikes. Combat validation strengthens case for additional contracts

analystOpinions.notableComment: Wedbush Dan Ives maintains $230 target, calls Palantir 'backbone of US military AI.' Forward P/E 114x and P/S 50x valuation concerns from multiple analysts

risks.title: Extreme valuation (Forward P/E ~114x)
risks.description: Even at +60% growth, P/E 114x and P/S 50x are extreme. Severe downside risk if growth decelerates

risks.title: Ethical concerns (Iran war AI deployment)
risks.description: Reports of Palantir + Anthropic AI used in Iran strikes. ESG investor exodus and regulatory risk

risks.title: Broad tech weakness (macro)
risks.description: Rising oil prices, Middle East tensions, Nasdaq correction. High-valuation names most vulnerable

risks.title: Insider selling pressure
risks.description: Insider selling amid tech weakness adds pressure. Amplified at P/E 114x

risks.title: Competition intensifying (Anduril $60B)
risks.description: Anduril pursuing $60B valuation funding round. Defense AI market competition accelerating

buyReasons.title: Maven designation secures defense revenue stability
buyReasons.rationale: Upgraded from pilot to official program. Long-term budget allocation and military-wide deployment confirmed

buyReasons.title: US commercial revenue +137% explosive growth
buyReasons.rationale: Q4 US commercial $650M (+137% YoY). Ideal structure of accelerating growth while reducing government dependency

buyReasons.title: Rule of 40 score 127%
buyReasons.rationale: Revenue growth + profit margin at 127%. Achieved by very few SaaS companies globally

buyReasons.title: Combat-validated AI platform
buyReasons.rationale: Real-time use in thousands of Iran strikes. Combat data and trust that competitors cannot replicate

overallOpinion: Maven's military-wide adoption and Iran combat validation elevated Palantir's defense moat. The UK FCA trial signals expansion beyond defense into regulatory sectors. These are assets money cannot buy.
However, the 3/24 decline of -3.77% shows how heavy Forward P/E 114x really is. Good news (Maven) drove a one-day rally that was immediately reversed by macro weakness. This pattern may repeat.
Technically healthy above 50-day ($148) and 200-day ($120) averages. Consensus $196 (+27%). Plenty of rebound potential when macro stabilizes, but new entries at P/E 114x carry significant risk.

investmentVerdict.summary: Maven designation and +60% growth are impressive, but Forward P/E 114x makes new entries risky. Existing holders should maintain positions and consider adding on macro-driven dips. Monitor Iran war ethical concerns.

sources.name: Motley Fool
sources.description: Maven designation + Iran combat deployment analysis

sources.name: 24/7 Wall St
sources.description: Tech selloff impact on PLTR analysis

sources.name: Intellectia AI
sources.description: 2026 price forecast and valuation deep dive

x.hook: Palantir rallied on Maven, then gave it all back
x.text:
$PLTR (Mar 25) Maven military adoption drove +6.78%. Next day: -3.77% on tech weakness. P/E 114x giveth and taketh. $154.78.

1/4
thread:
Combat-tested in Iran with thousands of strikes. UK FCA trial started. The company is executing flawlessly.

2/4

US commercial +137%, revenue guide $7.2B (+61%). Rule of 40 at 127%. Growth metrics are elite.

3/4

Above 50 and 200-day averages. Target $196 (+27%). Great company if you can stomach P/E 114x.

4/4

threads.hook: Maven adoption surge reversed by macro weakness
threads.text:
$PLTR (Mar 25) $154.78 (-3.77%)

Maven military-wide adoption drove +6.78%, then tech weakness erased it all. Good news rallies instantly reversed by macro, the pattern of a P/E 114x stock.

But the business is perfect. Combat-tested in Iran, UK FCA trial, US commercial +137%, revenue guide $7.2B (+61%). Rule of 40 at 127%.

Above 50-day ($148) and 200-day ($120). Target $196 (+27%). The best AI defense play if macro cooperates.

fact.hook: Maven adopted, rally reversed, P/E 114x burden
fact.text:
$PLTR (Mar 25) $154.78 (-3.77%)

Maven adopted. Iran combat-tested. +6.78% → -3.77%. FCA trial, commercial +137%, guide $7.2B. P/E 114x burden. Above 50 and 200-day. Target $196 (+27%).

witty.text:
$PLTR (Mar 25) $154.78 (-3.77%)

Palantir helped the US military execute thousands of strikes in Iran, got officially adopted, and the stock fell. At P/E 114x, you need world peace AND strong earnings.

UK FCA is a customer now, commercial +137%. At a normal P/E this stock would be flying. But 114x means every good headline is already priced in.

Target $196 (+27%). Great execution eventually wins, but at 114x, patience is the entry fee.

empathy.text:
$PLTR (Mar 25) $154.78 (-3.77%)

Maven adoption, +6.78% rally, then -3.77% reversal. This pattern is tiring. If you're holding Palantir, every headline feels like a rollercoaster.

The company itself is doing everything right. Military adoption, combat validation, FCA contract, +137% commercial. P/E 114x just means all this good news needs to keep coming.

Above both averages, healthy structure. Target $196 (+27%). Patience will pay. Eventually.
